name: functions
description: Cloud Functions wrapping the calc-engine module (issue #3) and assigning the consumer role claim on signup (issue #5).

scripts.test:emulator: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:exec --only functions "node test/calcEngine.emulator.test.mjs"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:start --only functions
